tag_line: New design - Wheel & Air Speed - Max & RT Torque/Power - Weight - Fuel Consum. - Odo
title: enhancedTacho: Stylish Interface, Superior Information - Real-Time Vehicle Monitoring
message:
[SIZE=1]Tacho with New design - Wheel & Air Speed - Max & RT Torque/Power - Weight - Fuel Consum. - Odometer[/SIZE]
[ATTACH]1127973[/ATTACH] 
[SIZE=5][B]enhancedTacho[/B] is an advanced version of the Tacho2 application from the base game
[URL='https://www.beamng.com/resources/enhanced-tachometer.27289/'][B]Enhanced Tachometer and Forced Induction[/B][/URL] & [URL='https://www.beamng.com/resources/simple-power-weight-ratio.23693/'][B]Simple power, weight, ratio[/B][/URL] integrated | [I]Thanks to[/I] [URL='https://www.beamng.com/members/nutunabe.541038/'][I]nutunabe[/I][/URL] [I]and[/I] [URL='https://www.beamng.com/members/fylhtq7779.133344/'][I]fylhtq7779[/I][/URL][/SIZE]


[SIZE=7][COLOR=rgb(255, 0, 0)][B]IMPORTANT[/B][/COLOR][/SIZE]
[SIZE=5][B]UNLOAD/UNSUBSCRIBE/DELETE "[/B]Enhanced Tachometer and Forced Induction[B]" & "[/B]Simple power, weight, ratio[B]"[/B][/SIZE]

[SIZE=7][COLOR=rgb(255, 0, 0)][B]IMPORTANT²[/B][/COLOR][/SIZE]
[SIZE=5][B]Now, V3 automatically replaces the "Tacho2" in the default game UI[/B]
There is [B]no need[/B] to [B]adjust your UI[/B] settings to accommodate this mod, as it [B]directly overwrites[/B] the default "[B]Tacho2[/B]" UI

[B]However, to avoid any bugs, please restart the game after installing the mod before you start playing![/B][/SIZE]


[SIZE=6][B]Full explain[/B][/SIZE]
[ATTACH]1127974[/ATTACH] 


[B][B][SIZE=7]v3.5 - Review-back
[B][SIZE=6]is Back[/SIZE][/B][/SIZE][/B]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]Version classic is BACK[/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]If you want to use this version, look for it in UI-Apps[/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]Power in real-time is BACK[/SIZE]
[*][SIZE=5]Layout rework[/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[SIZE=5][/SIZE]
[B][SIZE=7]v3.0 - Lite, Opti and New Features[/SIZE]
[SIZE=6]Features[/SIZE][/B]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5][B][COLOR=rgb(255, 165, 0)]MAX Power[/COLOR][/B] > ORANGE[/SIZE]
[*][SIZE=5][B][COLOR=rgb(0, 0, 255)]MAX Torque[/COLOR][/B] > BLUE[/SIZE]
[*][SIZE=5][B][COLOR=rgb(0, 255, 0)]Weight[/COLOR][/B] > GREEN[/SIZE]
[*][SIZE=5][B]ABS[/B][/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]Disabled if the car is not equipped with it[/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[*][SIZE=5][B]UI Apps[/B] [/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]ET3 overrides the default 'Tacho2'[/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[*][SIZE=5][B]Version[/B][/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5]Only V2[/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[/LIST]
[SIZE=6][B]Delete[/B][/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][B][SIZE=5]Power in real-time[/SIZE][/B]
[*][B][SIZE=5]Torque in real-time[/SIZE][/B]
[*][SIZE=5][B]Glow with Light [/B][/SIZE]
[LIST]
[*][SIZE=5][I]very lagy[/I][/SIZE]
[/LIST]
[*][B][SIZE=5]V1 and classic[/SIZE][/B]
[/LIST]
[B][SIZE=7]v2.0 - FUSION[/SIZE][/B]
[SIZE=6][B]Features[/B][/SIZE][/B]
[LIST]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]Air Speed[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] (ultra-precise GPS speed)[/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]Power in real-time[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] (at the flywheel) [HP][/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]MAX Power[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] (at the flywheel) [HP][/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]Torque in real-time[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] (at the flywheel) [NM][/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]MAX Torque[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] (at the flywheel) [NM][/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]Fuel Consumption[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5] l/100km[/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5][B]Maximum Gearbox[/B][/SIZE][/B][SIZE=5][B] Max of your gearbox[/B] (4/5/6...)[/SIZE]
[*][B][SIZE=5]Oil text Temperature[/SIZE][/B]
[*][B][SIZE=5]Weight in real-time[/SIZE][/B]
[/LIST]
[B][B][SIZE=5][/SIZE][/B][/B]
[SIZE=6][B]Download[/B][/SIZE]
[SIZE=5]The application is directly available on the [URL='https://beamng.com/resources/enhancedtacho-stylish-interface-superior-information-real-time-vehicle-monitoring.27982/']BeamNG repository[/URL]
[/SIZE]
[SIZE=6][B]Note[/B][/SIZE]
[SIZE=5]This is my first mod, please be kind
Your feedback is greatly appreciated
[/SIZE]
[SIZE=6][B]Feedback and Contributions[/B][/SIZE]
[SIZE=5]If you have ideas, suggestions, contributions, or if you encounter any errors, please open an [URL='https://github.com/YDeltagon/BeamNG_Tacho3/issues']Issue[/URL]/[URL='https://github.com/YDeltagon/BeamNG_Tacho3/pulls']Pulls[/URL], or, post a [URL='https://beamng.com/resources/enhancedtacho-stylish-interface-superior-information-real-time-vehicle-monitoring.27982/reviews']Review[/URL]
[/SIZE]

It's completely open-source, and contributions are welcome ![/SIZE]
